name: Carrying On His Will

notes: Bucket model intentionally separates core EV buckets from anniversary jackpots.
Use core EV for stable box economics; use full EV only when including ultra-rare chase outcomes.
For OP13, Red Super Parallel and God Pack style hits should not be mixed into a conservative EV baseline.

buckets.label: SR Base
buckets.classificationHint: Cards whose base rarity is SR and that are not parallel or special anniversary treatments.
notes: Community sources are aligned on roughly 4-5 SR per box.

buckets.label: SR Parallel / Alt Art
buckets.classificationHint: Parallel or alt-art versions of SR cards, excluding OP13 anniversary-only special buckets.
notes: Estimated from OP13-specific JP opening summaries; treat as provisional.

buckets.label: SEC Base
notes: Generic community expectation is 0-1 SEC per box; OP13-specific estimate narrows to roughly 1 per 1-2 boxes.

buckets.label: SEC Parallel
buckets.classificationHint: Parallel Secret Rares excluding Red Super Parallel and other explicitly separated jackpot buckets.
notes: Low-confidence estimate from OP13-specific community summaries.

buckets.label: Leader Parallel
buckets.classificationHint: Parallel leaders, excluding god-pack-only bundles if those are modeled separately.
notes: Very provisional. Community posts suggest leader parallel distribution is case-mapped in OP13.

buckets.label: SP / Super Parallel
buckets.classificationHint: OP13 super parallel or SP chase cards not already covered by anniversary-specific or Red Super Parallel buckets.
notes: Included only in full EV because one-box economics are highly skewed by these hits.

buckets.label: 3rd Anniversary Special
buckets.classificationHint: 3rd Anniversary special cards such as Gold/Silver Shanks-style inserts.
notes: Use as a jackpot bucket, not as part of a realistic baseline EV.

buckets.label: Gold DON
buckets.classificationHint: Gold DON or equivalent premium DON insert tracked independently from standard parallel hits.
notes: Derived from English case-opening community posts; keep confidence low.

buckets.label: God Pack / Demon Pack
buckets.classificationHint: Boxes or packs that replace normal hit structure with a bundled ultra-rare package.
notes: OP13 introduces a Demon Pack/God Pack style outcome according to multiple community sources.

buckets.label: Red Super Parallel
buckets.classificationHint: OP13-exclusive red super parallel bucket for Luffy/Ace/Sabo anniversary chase cards.
notes: Treat this as any Red Super Parallel, not a specific character.
This is the cleanest way to avoid tripling scarcity by incorrectly modeling each card independently.

sources.title: BOOSTER PACK -CARRYING ON HIS WILL- [OP-13] - Official EN
sources.notes: Official product page for release timing and rarity composition, not pull rates.

sources.title: ブースターパック 受け継がれる意志 [OP-13] - Official JP
sources.notes: Official JP product page for release timing and rarity composition, not pull rates.

sources.title: One Piece Card Game – Pull Rates & Hit Rates of the Japanese Edition
sources.notes: Generic unofficial community summary: SR 4-5, SEC 0-1, parallels 1-2 per display, manga 0-1 per case.

sources.title: OP-13 Pull Rates Best Cards
sources.notes: Commercial article, but it provides OP13-specific estimated pull-rate ranges and explicitly states rates are community-derived.

sources.title: OP-13 THREE BROTHER Case Study: Analyzing Pull Rates from a $400 Case
sources.notes: Useful as case-opening evidence, but should be aggregated with other sources before being promoted above low confidence.

sources.title: OP13 Case Pulls
sources.notes: English case-opening discussion; useful for coarse case-hit pattern signals only.

sources.title: OP13 hit rates?
sources.notes: Community estimates for gold DON, leader parallels and case-mapped anniversary anomalies.

notes: This seed does not change EV logic yet. It is a data model preparation step only.
All pull rates remain unofficial. Official Bandai sources define product composition but not exact hit odds.
